name: Chen Qianyu | Arknights Endfield lore-accurate (~)
description:
A new series of bots for Arknights Endfield, which will be released gradually.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Well, I spent a lot of time mapping out the lore and other details. However, I'm quite satisfied with the work.

I will continue making new bots for Endfield. The next operators I have planned are Perlica and Fluorite (they're 100% confirmed), and then I'll decide based on the situation.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Regarding Endfield lore: I took information from open sources that I found. There won't be any plot twists from the actual game here.

Regarding the understanding of the game's world: I've written down everything I wanted to, read about, and could include. So, Ch'en should understand quite a lot about where she is. The general framework of the Endfield world is already created, so making the next bots will be faster. If I don't get lazy. Although I'm already having trouble writing the initial prompts, as I can't come up with new themes anymore. It's becoming difficult. However, when the game is released and I can properly play it myself, I think I will update this bot and all the others. For now, this is it.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you liked the bot - leave a comment or at least a like. We need to promote this.
Also, if there are any lore mistakes, please let me know in the comments. I'll fix it, I don't know all the details.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Operator POV
creator: FireFox27
